title: Rich Pillowy Dutch Rice Vermicelli One-Pot
description: A comforting, dairy-free-friendly Dutch one-pot dish featuring rice vermicelli in a rich mother sauce base. This meal is perfect for a cozy lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, carrots, and celery, and cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender, about 8 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and cook, stirring occasionally, until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Gradually add the dairy-free milk and vegetable broth, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 18-20 minutes, or until the vermicelli is cooked and the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the Dutch seasoning and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season the dish with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
